requirement: As a user, I can add a todo item to a todo list so that I can track tasks I need to complete.

testCases.name: Successfully add a single todo item with valid text

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed with an empty input field and existing todo list

steps.action: Click on the todo input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field is focused and ready for text entry

steps.action: Type 'Buy groceries' into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Text 'Buy groceries' appears in the input field

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: New todo item 'Buy groceries' is added to the todo list

testCases.expectedResult: The todo item 'Buy groceries' is successfully added to the list, the input field is cleared, and the item is visible in the todo list

testCases.name: Successfully add multiple todo items sequentially

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed

steps.action: Type 'Task 1' into the input field and press Enter
steps.expectedResult: 'Task 1' is added to the todo list and input field is cleared

steps.action: Type 'Task 2' into the input field and press Enter
steps.expectedResult: 'Task 2' is added to the todo list and input field is cleared

steps.action: Type 'Task 3' into the input field and press Enter
steps.expectedResult: 'Task 3' is added to the todo list and input field is cleared

testCases.expectedResult: All three todo items ('Task 1', 'Task 2', 'Task 3') appear in the todo list in the order they were added, and the input field is cleared after each addition

testCases.name: Attempt to add an empty todo item

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed with an empty input field

steps.action: Leave the input field empty
steps.expectedResult: Input field remains empty

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: No new todo item is added to the list and an error or warning is shown

testCases.expectedResult: The application prevents adding an empty todo item, displays an appropriate validation message, and the todo list remains unchanged

testCases.name: Attempt to add a todo item containing only whitespace

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed with an empty input field

steps.action: Type '     ' (spaces only) into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field appears to have content but contains only whitespace

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: No new todo item is added and a validation message is shown

testCases.expectedResult: The application trims whitespace and treats the input as empty, prevents adding the item, and displays an appropriate validation error

testCases.name: Add a todo item with maximum allowed character length

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed

steps.action: Type a string of exactly 255 characters (or the defined max length) into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field accepts text up to the maximum character limit

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: The todo item is added to the list with the full text

testCases.expectedResult: The todo item with the maximum allowed character length is successfully added and displayed correctly in the todo list without truncation or errors

testCases.name: Add a todo item exceeding maximum allowed character length

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed

steps.action: Type a string exceeding 255 characters (or the defined max length) into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field either stops accepting characters at the limit or shows a character count warning

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: Application either prevents submission or truncates the text and adds the item

testCases.expectedResult: The application either prevents the user from entering text beyond the maximum limit or displays a validation error and does not add the oversized todo item

testCases.name: Add a todo item with special characters and emojis

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed

steps.action: Type a todo item with special characters such as '<script>alert(1)</script> & Buy milk 🛒' into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field accepts the text with special characters

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: Todo item is added to the list

testCases.expectedResult: The todo item is safely added with special characters properly escaped/sanitized and displayed correctly without executing any scripts or causing rendering issues

testCases.name: Attempt to add a duplicate todo item

steps.action: Navigate to the todo application
steps.expectedResult: Todo application is displayed

steps.action: Type 'Buy groceries' and press Enter to add the first item
steps.expectedResult: 'Buy groceries' is added to the todo list

steps.action: Type 'Buy groceries' again into the input field
steps.expectedResult: Input field contains 'Buy groceries'

steps.action: Press Enter or click the Add button
steps.expectedResult: Application either adds the duplicate or shows a warning

testCases.expectedResult: The application either prevents adding duplicate todo items and shows an appropriate message, or adds the duplicate and clearly differentiates both entries in the list
